dumbwaiter-not-linked: This dumbwaiter isn't connected to anything.
dumbwaiter-obstructed: Something is blocking the other end.
dumbwaiter-shaft-blocked: The shaft is blocked — clear it to use the dumbwaiter.
dumbwaiter-too-far: The other station is too far away.
dumbwaiter-in-use: The dumbwaiter is already in motion.
dumbwaiter-not-on-platform: Step onto the platform first, or set a container on top to send it.
dumbwaiter-cargo-sent: The container rattles away to the other station.
dumbwaiter-cargo-immovable: That container is too bulky for the dumbwaiter.
dumbwaiter-cargo-reinforced: That container is locked or reinforced in place.
dumbwaiter-cargo-dest-blocked: There's no room for the container at the other end.
dumbwaiter-cargo-jammed: The dumbwaiter jammed — the container stayed where it was.
dumbwaiter-broken-be: This station's data was lost. Break and replace it.
dumbwaiter-link-too-far: These stations are too far apart to link.
dumbwaiter-link-failed: Could not link — is there a station at both ends?
dumbwaiter-label-needs-ink: You need an ink and quill or a piece of charcoal to write a label.
dumbwaiter-info-linked-above: Linked to a station {0} blocks above
dumbwaiter-info-linked-below: Linked to a station {0} blocks below
